laws.section_title: Rights and liabilities of lessor and lessee
laws.original_text: Section 108, Transfer of Property Act: Defines rights and liabilities between landlord (lessor) and tenant (lessee), including contractual obligations regarding possession and terms of tenancy.
laws.simplified: My landlord is not returning security deposit after tenancy. Under landlord tenant lease obligations, refundable security deposit should be returned after lawful deductions.
laws.punishment: Primarily civil remedy through contract/tenancy enforcement.
